title: HuminLoop
subtitle: Keeping humans in the loop — AI-powered knowledge capture for developers who build with AI

pitch.problem: Developers using AI coding tools lose context every time a new bug catches their eye. Switching apps to retype what they just saw burns the focus they had — especially brutal for ADHD brains.
pitch.plain_problem: When you spot a bug while coding with AI, you have to stop, switch apps, and retype what you saw. That breaks your focus every single time.

stages.label: Screenshot or annotate
stages.detail:
Clipboard watcher polls 1s for new images.
Or draw red/green/pink on screen with the toolbar overlay.
stages.plain_detail:
HuminLoop notices any screenshot you take.
Or you scribble colors on the screen to mark what's wrong.

stages.label: Capture window context
stages.detail: Active window title, process, and repo path captured automatically (Win32 / xdotool / gdbus).
stages.plain_detail: It also remembers what app and file you were looking at when you took the shot.

stages.label: Rules + Gemini sort
stages.detail:
7-strategy rule chain runs instantly.
Gemini 2.5 Flash enriches in the background — summary, tags, project match.
stages.plain_detail: Sorts your note by project, adds tags, and writes a fix-it summary — without you doing anything.

stages.label: Generate coding prompt
stages.plain_label: Writes the AI prompt for you
stages.detail:
Annotation colors decoded (red=remove, green=add, pink=ref).
Prompt enriched with SESSION.md + AUDIT_LOG context.
stages.plain_detail: Turns your scribble plus a one-line note into a ready-to-paste instruction for an AI coder.

stages.label: Send to IDE via MCP
stages.plain_label: Hands it to your AI tool
stages.detail:
Stages IDE_PROMPT.md to .ai-workflow/.
MCP server delivers one-shot to Claude Code or Gemini CLI.
stages.plain_detail: Your AI coding tool picks it up and starts fixing — you never broke focus.

audiences.label: For Recruiters & Stakeholders
audiences.headline: Shipped, cross-platform, opinionated
audiences.detail: An ADHD-friendly desktop app shipping NSIS / AppImage / deb / dmg installers from a single repo. Vanilla JS renderer. Native JWT for Vertex AI — no SDK dependencies. Multi-agent dev workflow baked in.
audiences.plain_detail: A working app for Windows, Linux, and Mac, built solo by one developer. The installers are already on GitHub.
audiences.quote: Wait, this guy actually shipped this?
audiences.plain_quote: Wait, one person built this whole thing?

audiences.label: For Engineers & Collaborators
audiences.headline: Bridge between screen and AI
audiences.detail: Electron 33, dual-DB (Postgres or SQLite auto-fallback), Gemini 2.5 Flash, and an MCP server with 19 tools that lets any AI IDE talk to your clip database. Send-to-IDE uses a one-shot file bridge — staged and consumed atomically.
audiences.plain_detail: Built on Electron with a database that auto-picks Postgres or SQLite. Talks to Gemini for AI. Includes a server that hooks into Claude Code or other AI editors.
audiences.quote: I want to fork this and wire it into Claude Code.
audiences.plain_quote: I want to copy this and connect it to my AI tools.

audiences.label: For Anyone Else
audiences.headline: Like a sticky note, but smarter
audiences.plain_headline: Like a sticky note, but smarter
audiences.detail: You see something that needs fixing. You snip a screenshot, jot what's wrong, and the app organizes it for you. If you have an AI helper, it writes the instruction so you can act on it later.
audiences.plain_detail: You take a screenshot, write a quick note, and the app sorts it. If you use an AI helper, it writes the fix-it message for you.
audiences.quote: It's Pinterest for things I want to fix later.
audiences.plain_quote: It's Pinterest for things I want to fix later.

pitch.bet: Knowledge capture is the missing layer between AI coding tools and a developer's flow state. Every screenshot is a bug report waiting to be acted on — HuminLoop closes the loop in seconds, not minutes.
pitch.plain_bet: AI tools can write code fast — but you still have to tell them what to fix. HuminLoop makes that handoff take seconds, so you don't lose your train of thought.
